title: вЂ‹вЂ‹Multiply deep dives: Scotland, Wales, Northern IrelandвЂ‹
body: "вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹The reports presented here include вЂњdeep diveвЂќ process evaluation of the Multiply programme in Scotland,В WalesВ and Northern Ireland.В This includesВ qualitativeВ research conducted with one local authority orВ accountable body per deep dive, as well as synthesised evidenceВ collected during the UK Shared Prosperity Fund (UKSPF) place-level evaluation inВ Scotland,В WalesВ and Northern Ireland.вЂ‹вЂ‹ "
